title: Introduction to IAM Architecture
introduction: Imagine a school with secure access control, that's IAM

scenes.narration: Consider a school with locked doors, only authorized staff and students can enter, similar to how IAM works in organizations
Just like a school has a principal, teachers, and students, IAM has its own set of components like identity providers and service providers
When you log in to your school's network, IAM is working behind the scenes to verify your identity and grant access to authorized resources

conclusion: In conclusion, IAM architecture is like a secure school, controlling access and ensuring only authorized individuals can enter
quiz_question: What is the main purpose of IAM?
quiz_answer: To control and manage access to resources
